claimText: Microsoft Copilot is Northwestern's primary approved generative AI tool. All students, faculty, and staff have access to free Copilot Chat, with full Copilot for Microsoft 365 available as a paid subscription.

citation.citationTitle: Getting Started with Generative AI - Northwestern University IT
